initiatives.name:
No More Deaths / No Más
                            Muertes
initiatives.description: A humanitarian organization fostering mutual aid and solidarity through direct aid to migrants in the borderlands. They coordinate water drops, emergency medical care, and solidarity networks while building power through humanitarian assistance, advocacy, and creating pathways for migrant justice and survival.

initiatives.name: Aliento
initiatives.description: A DACA recipient and undocumented youth-led organization building community power through mutual aid, arts, and healing justice. They coordinate direct support, leadership development, and solidarity networks while centering the voices of directly impacted communities in the fight for immigrant justice.

initiatives.name: Trans Queer Pueblo
initiatives.description: A safe space for LGBT+ migrants of color in Arizona.

initiatives.name: Ajo Samaritans
initiatives.description: A humanitarian aid organization providing mutual aid and direct support to migrants in the Sonoran Desert. They coordinate water drops, emergency response, and resource sharing while building networks of solidarity and care across the Arizona borderlands.

initiatives.name: Mass Liberation Arizona
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through prison abolition and criminal justice reform across Arizona. They coordinate direct support, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing, policy advocacy, and creating pathways for transformative justice.

initiatives.name: Industrial Workers of the World - Northern Arizona
initiatives.description: A worker-led organization fostering mutual aid and labor solidarity through organizing and direct support across Northern Arizona. They coordinate worker advocacy, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through collective action, worker education, and creating spaces for labor organizing.

initiatives.name: Death Penalty Alternatives for Arizona
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through death penalty abolition work across Arizona. They coordinate advocacy, education, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing, policy reform, and creating pathways for restorative justice.

initiatives.name: Equality Arizona
initiatives.description: A statewide organization fostering mutual aid and community power through LGBTQ+ advocacy and civic engagement across Arizona. They coordinate community building, education initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through policy advocacy, voter engagement, and creating pathways for LGBTQ+ civil rights and social equality.

initiatives.name: Sonoran Prevention Works
initiatives.description: A grassroots harm reduction organization fostering mutual aid and community care through direct support across Arizona. They coordinate harm reduction supplies distribution, overdose prevention education, and solidarity networks while building power through peer support, advocacy, and creating spaces for dignity and healing in harm reduction.

initiatives.name: O'odham Piipaash Alliance
initiatives.description: An Indigenous-led collective fostering mutual aid and solidarity through cultural preservation and land defense in O'odham and Piipaash territories. They coordinate community support, traditional knowledge sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through Indigenous sovereignty and creating pathways for cultural resurgence.

initiatives.name: Save Oak Flat
initiatives.description: An Indigenous-led movement fostering mutual aid and solidarity through the protection of sacred Apache land at Oak Flat. They coordinate direct action, cultural preservation, and solidarity networks while building power through Indigenous sovereignty and creating pathways for sacred land defense.

initiatives.name: K'é Infoshop
initiatives.description: Anti-colonial, anti-heteropatriarchy, and anti-capitalist with indigenous feminism as our guiding principles. We're a collective of Diné uniting to liberate nihi k'ei/our relatives.

initiatives.name: AZ Comm-Unity
initiatives.description: central hub for all people and groups within all of Arizona who are taking a stand against the rising wave of authoritarianism and fascism to come together to meet and coordinate with their local communities as well as communicate with the rest of the movement around the state.

initiatives.name: AZ50501 Discord Server
initiatives.description: Get the latest updates on the 50501 movement and connect with other Arizonans

initiatives.name: Haul No
initiatives.description: Protect Grand Canyon, sacred sites, precious water, and our communities from uranium mining!
